item.title: Notiqflow 0.3.0
item.description:
Notiqflow 0.3.0

  • Notiqflow learns your corrections. After dictation, high-confidence spelling and capitalization corrections can be learned automatically and applied to your very next dictation.
  • You stay in control. Learned replacements can be undone immediately, then edited or removed from Dictionary settings. Phrase and supported writing-style preferences always ask before being saved.
  • Private by design. Correction learning briefly reads only the field Notiqflow just inserted into, stops after 30 seconds or when focus changes, and runs entirely on your Mac. It can be disabled in Settings > Dictionary.
